question: Can lowering cholesterol to very low levels safely prevent heart disease?
topic: Combats cholesterol denialism that overlaps with anti-pharmaceutical sentiment

sources.name: Secondhand Smoke Exposure and Cardiovascular Effects: Making Sense of the Evidence

discovery_sources.text: 26 randomized controlled trials demonstrate consistent cardiovascular benefit from cholesterol lowering—claim appears supported by current evidence
